name: codegraphcontext
description: Graph-based code intelligence for Codex via the CodeGraphContext MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Query local codebases through a semantic code graph
interface.longDescription: CodeGraphContext indexes local repositories into a graph database and exposes code search, relationship analysis, call-chain tracing, and repository context through MCP. This plugin starts the CodeGraphContext MCP server with `cgc mcp start`.
defaultPrompt: Use CodeGraphContext to index this repository
Find callers of this function with CodeGraphContext
Trace this dependency path through the code graph
